peerGroups.extractionNotes: DIRECTION FLAG: PG4 Part B tables have NO direction column. Directions determined from the spec's own monotonic bar ordering (Excellent=best -> Distress=worst): D/E and RecvD ascend = lower_better; all other metrics descend = higher_better. Unambiguous and consistent with universal metric definitions; not a guess. Source file is .md (not docx). Market present (B.5 weights; B.6 anchor-lift). No continuous Ownership bars (none found). CashConv/D/E/IC/AsstT/FCF-PAT/TTM-IC carry the spec's 'x' notation; IC/AsstT/TTM-IC recorded as times, CashConv/FCF-PAT/D-E as ratio. CashConv/FCF-PAT ratio-scale (matches PG2/PG3, differs from PG1). IC Distress and 'TTM IC' values transcribed verbatim incl '-0.00'.

peerGroups.intraPillarWeightingNote: default equal (Foundation 10 x 10%, Momentum 4 x 25% via engine renormalization; intraPillarWeight left null per convention).
peerGroups.extractionNotes: Rev4: full 5-bar set, 10F + 4M. N5_OCFConsistency and M5_OCF_Consistency DROPPED (removed entirely). SSCU conditional bars now carried as NEW OPTIONAL fields sscuBars + sscuScope on F1_OPM and M1_OPM_TTM ONLY (3-anchor; acceptable/concerning=null; scope=TataPower,TorrentPower) — LOADER MUST READ these two new optional fields; all other metrics have no sscuBars. Rev4: anchor scores normalized to universal 20/40/60/75/90; was 35/75/100. CN-1 restored. 7 A=G band collapses (F1_OPM, N1_ROCE, N2_ROE, N3_AssetTurnover, F6_FCF_PAT, M3_RevYoY, M4_NPYoY) — PG8 peers structurally below survivor cohort on those metrics (real signal). No continuous Ownership bars carried (Ownership universal). CashConv/FCF on canonical ratio scale. NOTE: F5_CashConv distress=-79.72 is an extreme value on ratio scale (vs C/A/G/E of 1.67/2.25/2.39/3.76) — carried over from the original PG8 spec distress anchor and transcribed as instructed; flagged for operator sanity-check. Values supplied via MSR-PG8 Rev4 directive (this chat), not re-read from a docx. OCF Consistency (N5) restored to Foundation per MSR-PG8-OCF-restore — Foundation now 11 metrics (was 10 in Rev4); all-bars-100 degenerate-flat, treated identically to PG3/PG10/PG12/PG13.
